# Project Launcher

## What this sleeve does
Project Launcher is a build-and-ship orchestration sleeve for taking scattered work and driving it through file operations, Git/GitHub setup, environment setup, documentation generation, code organization, self-modification, and multi-step project orchestration.

## NeoStacks in this sleeve
- file operations and workspace shaping
- Git / repository initialization and history management
- environment and dependency setup
- README / docs / examples generation
- code organization and cleanup
- sleeve/block analysis and modification
- task planning / progress tracking / next-step orchestration

## NeoBlocks in this sleeve
Representative NeoBlocks include:
- `PL.NB.001` File Reader
- `PL.NB.002` File Writer
- `PL.NB.003` Directory Navigator
- `PL.NB.004` File Organizer
- `PL.NB.005` Backup Creator
- `PL.NB.006` Git Initializer
- `PL.NB.007` Commit Manager
- `PL.NB.010` Dependency Manager
- `PL.NB.013` README Generator
- `PL.NB.017` Project Structurer
- `PL.NB.020` Block Browser
- `PL.NB.021` Sleeve Modifier
- `PL.NB.022` Sleeve Builder
- `PL.NB.024` Task Planner
- `PL.NB.025` Progress Tracker
- `PL.NB.026` Next Step Suggester

## MOLT blocks in this sleeve
This launcher sleeve is a meta-build/orchestration sleeve and its current extracted surface is largely capability-style NeoBlocks rather than a classic public MOLT family explosion.

## Notes
This updated version is aligned to the stronger private launcher sleeve library and should be treated as the public HUMAN-facing summary of the launcher/orchestration lane.
It is a strong HUMAN-side public entry, but the machine-facing public sleeve lane remains intentionally smaller and more disciplined.
